embeds.title: Morimens: Lightless Realm Overview #morimens #animehorrorgame #love...
embeds.description:
A 60 second overview of select features in the game Morimens. The second anniversary update changed a lot, so today let's explore the Lightless Realm!

Anime + Lovecraftian cosmos makes for a memorable gameplay experience. The characters are beautifully rendered and the story is far darker than I wa
